summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the TrackFlow requirements including backend data models, authentication routing, dashboard components, admin panel components, habits, and UI theming. However, several page-level files are missing from the diff and some specific acceptance criteria cannot be verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Login page displays Internet Identity sign-in button and successful login redirects to /pricing page
missing_requirements.reason: No LoginPage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports LoginPage from './pages/LoginPage' but the file itself is not shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Pricing page showing all three plans with features listed and correct INR pricing
missing_requirements.reason: No PricingPage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports it but the implementation is not visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: UPI payment page with UPI ID yadavmannan007@okicici, QR code placeholder, transaction ID field, coupon validation, and confirmation screen
missing_requirements.reason: No PaymentPage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports it but the implementation is not visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: All data models persisted in stable Motoko state with CRUD operations, plan limit enforcement, and payment status transitions
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo file is truncated and key function implementations are cut off. Cannot fully verify all acceptance criteria are met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard page with welcome message, stat cards, Add Activity form, Today's Timeline, and Habit Progress Bars
missing_requirements.reason: No DashboardPage.tsx file is present in the diff. Individual components exist but the page assembly is missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Analytics page with Pie Chart, Bar Chart, Line Chart, date range selector, and plan-based access control
missing_requirements.reason: No AnalyticsPage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports it but the implementation is not visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Activities page with filter bar, table view, pagination, bulk delete, and CSV export
missing_requirements.reason: No ActivitiesPage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports it but the implementation is not visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Habits page showing habits list with streak count, Add/Edit/Delete, and plan limit enforcement
missing_requirements.reason: No HabitsPage.tsx file is present in the diff. HabitFormModal and UpgradePlanModal components exist but the page itself is missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Profile page with editable phone, account statistics, Delete Account with confirmation, and Export My Data
missing_requirements.reason: No ProfilePage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports it but the implementation is not visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin panel page assembling all admin components including pending payments queue, users table, coupon management, and platform stats
missing_requirements.reason: No AdminPage.tsx file is present in the diff. App.tsx imports it but the page assembly is missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Platform-wide stats must include active users today
missing_requirements.reason: PlatformStats.tsx shows totalUsers, totalActivities, totalHabits, and totalPaymentRequests but does NOT include 'active users today' as required by REQ-10.

missing_requirements.requirement: TrackFlow app logo image file trackflow-logo.dim_256x256.png — minimalist clock/checkmark combination mark in Indigo on white background
missing_requirements.reason: No image assets are present in the diff. The required logo image file is not added.

missing_requirements.requirement: UPI payment QR code placeholder graphic upi-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png with Scan to Pay label in Indigo
missing_requirements.reason: No image assets are present in the diff. The required QR code placeholder image file is not added.

hallucinated_features.description: Built with caffeine.ai attribution link in the footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies footer text as only '© {year} TrackFlow. All rights reserved.' The caffeine.ai attribution link was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Platform stats include Total Habits and Payment Requests counters instead of Active Users Today
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-10 specifically requires active users today as a platform-wide stat. The implementation replaced this with Total Habits and Payment Requests which were not requested as admin dashboard stats.

hallucinated_features.description: Copy-to-clipboard functionality for principal IDs in the admin UsersTable
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request for the admin users table does not mention copy-to-clipboard for principal IDs. This feature was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: UserApproval and MixinAuthorization mixins included in backend actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a user approval workflow separate from payment verification, nor does it mention MixinAuthorization or MixinStorage patterns. These are framework additions not explicitly requested.
